headline: COMMUNITY FAVORITE
title: The world's largest prompt library, yours to keep.
subtitle: With over 153,000 GitHub stars, Prompts.chat is where developers, writers, and tinkerers come to spark ideas. Browse thousands of community-crafted prompts for any AI — or self-host the whole thing in minutes.

headline: EDITOR'S PICK
title: Download anything. Keep everything beautiful.
subtitle: Macabolic wraps yt-dlp's raw power in a polished macOS interface — grab videos and audio from YouTube and 1,000+ other sites, with SponsorBlock, subtitles, and playlist support built right in.

headline: HIDDEN GEM
title: Your App Store empire, managed in one command.
subtitle: asc brings the full App Store Connect API to your terminal — ship builds, manage TestFlight, update screenshots, and handle subscriptions without ever opening a browser. AI-agent ready from day one.

headline: MUST TRY
title: Docs that draw themselves.
subtitle: VitePress Mermaid Renderer transforms plain code blocks into interactive, exportable diagrams inside your VitePress site. Dark mode, custom themes, and one-click PNG export included.
